biz_name: ALISADOS MIAMI DANIELA ALZATE - Salón de belleza Miami Florida

messages.body: Hi,  I hope you are doing well.  My name is Tanvi Mittal, and I am a Senior Growth Specialist at Zoca. I’ve been reviewing your account and would love the opportunity to connect with you for a brief feedback call to unde…

Hello Daniela! Merry Christmas!🎄🎁  Wishing you a joyous holiday season filled with love, laughter, and all the things that bring you happiness.   Thank you for your trust and support throughout the year. It’s been a plea…
Hello Daniela,  Hope you’re doing well!   I tried calling you, however, it went straight to voicemail. Can you please let me know when we can connect to help you out with the cancellation?

Hello Daniela,  Happy Thanksgiving, hope you’re having a great day ♥️  We acknowledge your request to cancel and I’d love to get on a call to get some feedback.   Please text me when you’re available for a quick call, so…
